title: goodenia maretensis
intro: Goodenia maretensis is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Goodenia maretensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to promote healing, reduce pain, and boost the immune system.
